index.overview: Systematic repair plan to fix all identified issues in the TeenWork application. Phases must be executed in order due to dependencies.

phases.name: Critical Security Fixes
phases.description: Remove security vulnerabilities, hardcoded credentials, and fix memory leaks
keyDeliverables: Implement environment variables for Firebase config
Remove AI API key from frontend

phases.name: Remove Hardcoded Data & Implement Firestore Integration
phases.description: Replace all mock data with real Firestore queries and implement complete data architecture
keyDeliverables: Create service layer for data operations

phases.name: Error Handling & User Feedback
phases.description: Implement comprehensive error handling, loading states, and user feedback
keyDeliverables: Add try-catch to all async operations

phases.name: Code Deduplication & Refactoring
phases.description: Eliminate code duplication and refactor for maintainability
keyDeliverables: Refactor login pages to reduce duplication

phases.name: Performance Optimization
phases.description: Optimize bundle size, implement code splitting, and improve performance
keyDeliverables: Implement lazy loading and code splitting

phases.name: TypeScript & Code Quality
phases.description: Enable TypeScript strict mode, add linting, formatting, and pre-commit hooks

phases.name: Testing & Documentation
phases.description: Add comprehensive testing suite and documentation
keyDeliverables: Write unit tests for utilities and hooks

phases.name: Accessibility & UX Enhancements
phases.description: Add accessibility features, dark mode, and internationalization
keyDeliverables: Add ARIA attributes and keyboard navigation

executionGuidelines.sequenceRequirement: Phases must be executed in numerical order due to dependencies

qualityStandards.noErrors: Zero TypeScript errors, zero ESLint errors after each phase
qualityStandards.noHardcoding: No hardcoded data, credentials, or magic values
qualityStandards.noDisconnects: All components must integrate with real data sources
qualityStandards.noMocksInProduction: No fake data, mocks, or stubs in production code

validationRequirements.afterEachTask: Run validation steps listed in task definition
validationRequirements.beforeNextPhase: Ensure previous phase is 100% complete and tested

executionGuidelines.rollbackStrategy: Each phase should be in its own git commit. If phase fails, revert to previous phase commit.
executionGuidelines.documentation: Update README.md and CHANGELOG.md after each phase completion

criticalRules: NO hardcoded credentials or API keys
ALL data must come from Firestore
ALL components must have loading states
ALL async operations must have try-catch

successCriteria.functional: Application has real job matching functionality with actual data
successCriteria.security: No exposed credentials, proper Firebase Security Rules

notes: Phase 1 (Security) is CRITICAL and must be completed immediately
Phases 2-3 transform the app from prototype to production
Phases 4-6 improve code quality and maintainability
Phases 7-8 add professional polish and accessibility
Total estimated time: ~3 weeks of focused development
Can be parallelized across multiple developers after Phase 3
